## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused.
- [ ] Lint passes.
- [ ] Build passes.
- [ ] Unit tests pass.
- [ ] E2E tests pass when applicable.
- [ ] A migration is included when the Prisma schema changed.
- [ ] `.env.example` is updated when environment variables changed.
- [ ] Documentation is updated.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or tokens are committed.
- [ ] Generated files were not edited manually.
